judicatorRune.title: Judicator
JUDICATOR_RUNE.title: Judicator
judicatorRune.description: Deal [blue]20%[/blue] more damage to enemies below 50% HP. Whenever an enemy dies, restore your Energy to full.
JUDICATOR_RUNE.description: Deal [blue]20%[/blue] more damage to enemies below 50% HP. Whenever an enemy dies, restore your Energy to full.
judicatorRune.flavor: Every ending sounds cleaner when spoken like a verdict.
JUDICATOR_RUNE.flavor: Every ending sounds cleaner when spoken like a verdict.
slapRune.title: Slap
SLAP_RUNE.title: Slap
slapRune.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength. Triggers up to [blue]3[/blue] times each turn.
SLAP_RUNE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength. Triggers up to [blue]3[/blue] times each turn.
slapRune.flavor: If you're going to humiliate them, get paid in stats for it.
SLAP_RUNE.flavor: If you're going to humiliate them, get paid in stats for it.
tankEngineRune.title: Tank Engine
TANK_ENGINE_RUNE.title: Tank Engine
tankEngineRune.description: After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Each stack grants [blue]5%[/blue] Max HP and increases your size by [blue]5%[/blue].
TANK_ENGINE_RUNE.description: After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Each stack grants [blue]5%[/blue] Max HP and increases your size by [blue]5%[/blue].
tankEngineRune.flavor: The louder it rattles, the harder it is to stop.
TANK_ENGINE_RUNE.flavor: The louder it rattles, the harder it is to stop.
eurekaRune.title: Eureka
EUREKA_RUNE.title: Eureka
eurekaRune.description: For every [blue]4[/blue] relics you have, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy each turn.
EUREKA_RUNE.description: For every [blue]4[/blue] relics you have, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy each turn.
infiniteLoopRune.title: Infinite Loop
INFINITE_LOOP_RUNE.title: Infinite Loop
infiniteLoopRune.description: Gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy each turn. After every [blue]5[/blue] combat victories, gain another [blue]1[/blue] Energy each turn.
INFINITE_LOOP_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy each turn. After every [blue]5[/blue] combat victories, gain another [blue]1[/blue] Energy each turn.
infiniteLoopRune.flavor: Repeat something long enough and even failure becomes automation.
INFINITE_LOOP_RUNE.flavor: Repeat something long enough and even failure becomes automation.
astralBodyRune.title: Astral Body
ASTRAL_BODY_RUNE.title: Astral Body
astralBodyRune.description: Gain [blue]50[/blue] Max HP. Deal [blue]10%[/blue] less damage.
ASTRAL_BODY_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]50[/blue] Max HP. Deal [blue]10%[/blue] less damage.
astralBodyRune.flavor: The stars lend you mass, then collect their fee.
ASTRAL_BODY_RUNE.flavor: The stars lend you mass, then collect their fee.
ancientWineRune.title: Ancient Wine
ANCIENT_WINE_RUNE.title: Ancient Wine
ancientWineRune.description: Whenever you play a Skill, heal [blue]1[/blue].
ANCIENT_WINE_RUNE.description: Whenever you play a Skill, heal [blue]1[/blue].
ancientWineRune.flavor: The oldest formulas are still the best at stitching fresh wounds.
ANCIENT_WINE_RUNE.flavor: The oldest formulas are still the best at stitching fresh wounds.
slowCookRune.title: Slow Cook
SLOW_COOK_RUNE.title: Slow Cook
slowCookRune.description: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Burn[/gold] to all enemies equal to [blue]6%[/blue] of your Max HP, rounded down.
SLOW_COOK_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Burn[/gold] to all enemies equal to [blue]6%[/blue] of your Max HP, rounded down.
slowCookRune.flavor: Patience is just heat with better discipline.
SLOW_COOK_RUNE.flavor: Patience is just heat with better discipline.
noNonsenseRune.title: No Nonsense
NO_NONSENSE_RUNE.title: No Nonsense
noNonsenseRune.description: You cannot draw cards except for your normal start-of-turn draw. Each prevented draw instead grants that much Strength.
NO_NONSENSE_RUNE.description: You cannot draw cards except for your normal start-of-turn draw. Each prevented draw instead grants that much Strength.
noNonsenseRune.flavor: Unexpected cards are just slower punches.
NO_NONSENSE_RUNE.flavor: Unexpected cards are just slower punches.
dexterityToStrengthRune.title: Dexterity To Strength
DEXTERITY_TO_STRENGTH_RUNE.title: Dexterity To Strength
dexterityToStrengthRune.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength. Changes to your Dexterity are converted into equal Strength.
DEXTERITY_TO_STRENGTH_RUNE.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength. Changes to your Dexterity are converted into equal Strength.
dexterityToStrengthRune.flavor: If you can dodge faster, you can swing harder too.
DEXTERITY_TO_STRENGTH_RUNE.flavor: If you can dodge faster, you can swing harder too.
strengthToDexterityRune.title: Strength To Dexterity
STRENGTH_TO_DEXTERITY_RUNE.title: Strength To Dexterity
strengthToDexterityRune.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Dexterity. Changes to your Strength are converted into equal Dexterity.
STRENGTH_TO_DEXTERITY_RUNE.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Dexterity. Changes to your Strength are converted into equal Dexterity.
strengthToDexterityRune.flavor: Raw force eventually teaches the body how to move.
STRENGTH_TO_DEXTERITY_RUNE.flavor: Raw force eventually teaches the body how to move.
dexterityStrengthToFocusRune.title: Dexterity Strength To Focus
DEXTERITY_STRENGTH_TO_FOCUS_RUNE.title: Dexterity Strength To Focus
dexterityStrengthToFocusRune.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Focus. Changes to your Strength and Dexterity are converted into equal Focus.
DEXTERITY_STRENGTH_TO_FOCUS_RUNE.descrip: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Focus. Changes to your Strength and Dexterity are converted into equal Focus.
dexterityStrengthToFocusRune.flavor: Compress every bodily noise into the core.
DEXTERITY_STRENGTH_TO_FOCUS_RUNE.flavor: Compress every bodily noise into the core.
superBrainRune.title: Super Brain
SUPER_BRAIN_RUNE.title: Super Brain
superBrainRune.description: At the start of each combat, gain Plated Armor equal to [blue]1/3[/blue] of your main deck size, rounded down.
SUPER_BRAIN_RUNE.description: At the start of each combat, gain Plated Armor equal to [blue]1/3[/blue] of your main deck size, rounded down.
superBrainRune.flavor: The smartest tax is the one that turns into armor.
SUPER_BRAIN_RUNE.flavor: The smartest tax is the one that turns into armor.
giantSlayerRune.title: Giant Slayer
GIANT_SLAYER_RUNE.title: Giant Slayer
giantSlayerRune.description: Draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards each turn. When you deal damage to an enemy, gain [blue]10%[/blue] more damage for every [blue]50[/blue] Max HP it has above you, up to [blue]50%[/blue].
GIANT_SLAYER_RUNE.description: Draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards each turn. When you deal damage to an enemy, gain [blue]10%[/blue] more damage for every [blue]50[/blue] Max HP it has above you, up to [blue]50%[/blue].
giantSlayerRune.flavor: Measure the knee first. The rest follows.
GIANT_SLAYER_RUNE.flavor: Measure the knee first. The rest follows.
nimbleRune.title: Nimble
NIMBLE_RUNE.title: Nimble
nimbleRune.flavor: Most turns only needed one more card anyway.
NIMBLE_RUNE.flavor: Most turns only needed one more card anyway.
overflowRune.title: Overflow
OVERFLOW_RUNE.title: Overflow
overflowRune.description: Non-X-cost cards in your hand cost [blue]+1[/blue]. The healing you receive, the Block you gain, and the damage you deal are doubled.
OVERFLOW_RUNE.description: Non-X-cost cards in your hand cost [blue]+1[/blue]. The healing you receive, the Block you gain, and the damage you deal are doubled.
overflowRune.flavor: Open the gate and let every number spill over at once.
OVERFLOW_RUNE.flavor: Open the gate and let every number spill over at once.
sturdyRune.title: Sturdy
STURDY_RUNE.title: Sturdy
sturdyRune.description: At the start of each turn, heal [blue]2%[/blue] of your Max HP. If you are below [blue]50%[/blue] HP, heal [blue]5%[/blue] of your Max HP instead.
STURDY_RUNE.description: At the start of each turn, heal [blue]2%[/blue] of your Max HP. If you are below [blue]50%[/blue] HP, heal [blue]5%[/blue] of your Max HP instead.
sturdyRune.flavor: Cracked still counts as intact if it keeps holding.
STURDY_RUNE.flavor: Cracked still counts as intact if it keeps holding.
loopRune.title: Loop
LOOP_RUNE.title: Loop
loopRune.flavor: Yesterday's success is too efficient not to reuse.
LOOP_RUNE.flavor: Yesterday's success is too efficient not to reuse.
redEnvelopeRune.title: Red Envelope
RED_ENVELOPE_RUNE.title: Red Envelope
redEnvelopeRune.description: After winning combat, gain an extra reward: [blue]80%[/blue] chance for [blue]10~20[/blue] Gold, [blue]20%[/blue] chance for a random Relic.
RED_ENVELOPE_RUNE.description: After winning combat, gain an extra reward: [blue]80%[/blue] chance for [blue]10~20[/blue] Gold, [blue]20%[/blue] chance for a random Relic.
redEnvelopeRune.flavor: The first sound after opening it is always a calculator.
RED_ENVELOPE_RUNE.flavor: The first sound after opening it is always a calculator.
escapePlanRune.title: Escape Plan
ESCAPE_PLAN_RUNE.title: Escape Plan
escapePlanRune.description: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, then at the start of your next turn gain Block equal to [blue]60%[/blue] of your Max HP and gain [gold]Shrink[/gold] for [blue]1[/blue] turn. Once per combat.
ESCAPE_PLAN_RUNE.description: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, then at the start of your next turn gain Block equal to [blue]60%[/blue] of your Max HP and gain [gold]Shrink[/gold] for [blue]1[/blue] turn. Once per combat.
escapePlanRune.flavor: A real retreat was drafted long before the panic.
ESCAPE_PLAN_RUNE.flavor: A real retreat was drafted long before the panic.
mindPurificationRune.title: Mind Purification
MIND_PURIFICATION_RUNE.title: Mind Purification
mindPurificationRune.description: After you kill an enemy, deal damage equal to [blue]30%[/blue] of each other enemy's current HP to them.
MIND_PURIFICATION_RUNE.description: After you kill an enemy, deal damage equal to [blue]30%[/blue] of each other enemy's current HP to them.
mindPurificationRune.flavor: Purification is just violence with a cleaner slogan.
MIND_PURIFICATION_RUNE.flavor: Purification is just violence with a cleaner slogan.
badTasteRune.title: Bad Taste
BAD_TASTE_RUNE.title: Bad Taste
badTasteRune.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, heal [blue]1[/blue]. Triggers up to [blue]3[/blue] times each turn.
BAD_TASTE_RUNE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, heal [blue]1[/blue]. Triggers up to [blue]3[/blue] times each turn.
badTasteRune.flavor: Making them miserable is surprisingly nutritious.
BAD_TASTE_RUNE.flavor: Making them miserable is surprisingly nutritious.
courageOfColossusRune.title: Courage Of Colossus
COURAGE_OF_COLOSSUS_RUNE.title: Courage Of Colossus
courageOfColossusRune.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]3[/blue] Plated Armor. Triggers up to [blue]2[/blue] times each turn.
COURAGE_OF_COLOSSUS_RUNE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]3[/blue] Plated Armor. Triggers up to [blue]2[/blue] times each turn.
courageOfColossusRune.flavor: Real bravery usually wears itself in layers.
COURAGE_OF_COLOSSUS_RUNE.flavor: Real bravery usually wears itself in layers.
endlessRecoveryRune.title: Endless Recovery
ENDLESS_RECOVERY_RUNE.title: Endless Recovery
endlessRecoveryRune.description: Whenever you enter a room, heal [blue]3[/blue].
ENDLESS_RECOVERY_RUNE.description: Whenever you enter a room, heal [blue]3[/blue].
endlessRecoveryRune.flavor: Travel time still counts as treatment.
ENDLESS_RECOVERY_RUNE.flavor: Travel time still counts as treatment.
glassCannonRune.title: Glass Cannon
GLASS_CANNON_RUNE.title: Glass Cannon
glassCannonRune.description: Deal [blue]40%[/blue] more damage. You cannot heal above [blue]70%[/blue] HP.
GLASS_CANNON_RUNE.description: Deal [blue]40%[/blue] more damage. You cannot heal above [blue]70%[/blue] HP.
glassCannonRune.flavor: Fragile is just another word for louder.
GLASS_CANNON_RUNE.flavor: Fragile is just another word for louder.
madScientistRune.title: Frankenstein
MAD_SCIENTIST_RUNE.title: Frankenstein
madScientistRune.description: When obtained, add an [gold]Elicit[/gold] to your deck. At the start of each combat, gain [blue]5[/blue] Orb slots and channel [blue]5[/blue] random Orbs.
MAD_SCIENTIST_RUNE.description: When obtained, add an [gold]Elicit[/gold] to your deck. At the start of each combat, gain [blue]5[/blue] Orb slots and channel [blue]5[/blue] random Orbs.
madScientistRune.flavor: Precision is optional. More wires is not.
MAD_SCIENTIST_RUNE.flavor: Precision is optional. More wires is not.
speedsterRune.title: Speedster
SPEEDSTER_RUNE.title: Speedster
speedsterRune.description: For every [blue]2[/blue] Max Energy you have, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card each turn, rounded down.
SPEEDSTER_RUNE.description: For every [blue]2[/blue] Max Energy you have, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card each turn, rounded down.
speedsterRune.flavor: Once the energy climbs, the hands follow.
SPEEDSTER_RUNE.flavor: Once the energy climbs, the hands follow.
speedDemonRune.title: Speed Demon
SPEED_DEMON_RUNE.title: Speed Demon
speedDemonRune.description: The first time each turn you deal damage to an enemy, draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
SPEED_DEMON_RUNE.description: The first time each turn you deal damage to an enemy, draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
speedDemonRune.flavor: The first one moving usually claims the first bonus too.
SPEED_DEMON_RUNE.flavor: The first one moving usually claims the first bonus too.
servantMasterRune.title: Servant Master
SERVANT_MASTER_RUNE.title: Servant Master
servantMasterRune.description: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]4[/blue] Summon.
SERVANT_MASTER_RUNE.description: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]4[/blue] Summon.
servantMasterRune.flavor: If a job can be delegated, it already should have been.
SERVANT_MASTER_RUNE.flavor: If a job can be delegated, it already should have been.
jeweledGauntletRune.title: Jeweled Gauntlet
JEWELED_GAUNTLET_RUNE.title: Jeweled Gauntlet
jeweledGauntletRune.description: Cards you play have a [blue]25%[/blue] chance to be played an additional time.
JEWELED_GAUNTLET_RUNE.description: Cards you play have a [blue]25%[/blue] chance to be played an additional time.
jeweledGauntletRune.flavor: Once it glitters, even mistakes start sounding expensive.
JEWELED_GAUNTLET_RUNE.flavor: Once it glitters, even mistakes start sounding expensive.
soulEaterRune.title: Soul Eater
SOUL_EATER_RUNE.title: Soul Eater
soulEaterRune.description: Every time you apply debuffs to enemies [blue]5[/blue] times, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP. Gain at most [blue]5[/blue] Max HP this way each combat.
SOUL_EATER_RUNE.description: Every time you apply debuffs to enemies [blue]5[/blue] times, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP. Gain at most [blue]5[/blue] Max HP this way each combat.
soulEaterRune.flavor: The more it eats, the more it resembles you.
SOUL_EATER_RUNE.flavor: The more it eats, the more it resembles you.
infernalConduitRune.title: Infernal Conduit
INFERNAL_CONDUIT_RUNE.title: Infernal Conduit
infernalConduitRune.description: Your targeted cards apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold]. For every [blue]5[/blue] Burn on enemies, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy at the start of your next turn.
INFERNAL_CONDUIT_RUNE.description: Your targeted cards apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold]. For every [blue]5[/blue] Burn on enemies, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy at the start of your next turn.
infernalConduitRune.flavor: A proper conduit carries heat as faithfully as power.
INFERNAL_CONDUIT_RUNE.flavor: A proper conduit carries heat as faithfully as power.
dualWieldRune.title: Dual Wield
DUAL_WIELD_RUNE.title: Dual Wield
dualWieldRune.description: Attack cards you play are played an additional time, but you deal [blue]40%[/blue] less damage.
DUAL_WIELD_RUNE.description: Attack cards you play are played an additional time, but you deal [blue]40%[/blue] less damage.
dualWieldRune.flavor: Two blades means neither hand gets to idle.
DUAL_WIELD_RUNE.flavor: Two blades means neither hand gets to idle.
goliathRune.title: Goliath
GOLIATH_RUNE.title: Goliath
goliathRune.description: Grow in size, gain [blue]40%[/blue] Max HP, and gain [blue]20%[/blue] more damage.
GOLIATH_RUNE.description: Grow in size, gain [blue]40%[/blue] Max HP, and gain [blue]20%[/blue] more damage.
goliathRune.flavor: Once you're tall enough, your shadow hits first.
GOLIATH_RUNE.flavor: Once you're tall enough, your shadow hits first.
donationRune.title: Donation
DONATION_RUNE.title: Donation
donationRune.flavor: No questions. Just take the money.
DONATION_RUNE.flavor: No questions. Just take the money.
heavyHitterRune.title: Heavy Hitter
HEAVY_HITTER_RUNE.title: Heavy Hitter
heavyHitterRune.description: Gain [blue]1%[/blue] more damage for every [blue]6[/blue] Max HP you have, up to [blue]30%[/blue].
HEAVY_HITTER_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]1%[/blue] more damage for every [blue]6[/blue] Max HP you have, up to [blue]30%[/blue].
heavyHitterRune.flavor: Mass eventually becomes a combat statistic.
HEAVY_HITTER_RUNE.flavor: Mass eventually becomes a combat statistic.
twiceThriceRune.title: Twice Thrice
TWICE_THRICE_RUNE.title: Twice Thrice
twiceThriceRune.description: Every third Attack card you play is played an additional time.
TWICE_THRICE_RUNE.description: Every third Attack card you play is played an additional time.
twiceThriceRune.flavor: The third blow is the one pretending not to be planned.
TWICE_THRICE_RUNE.flavor: The third blow is the one pretending not to be planned.
firebrandRune.title: Firebrand
FIREBRAND_RUNE.title: Firebrand
firebrandRune.description: Your Attack cards apply [blue]2[/blue] stacks of infinitely stackable [gold]Burn[/gold] to enemies.
FIREBRAND_RUNE.description: Your Attack cards apply [blue]2[/blue] stacks of infinitely stackable [gold]Burn[/gold] to enemies.
firebrandRune.flavor: If you're going to light something, don't stop at the edges.
FIREBRAND_RUNE.flavor: If you're going to light something, don't stop at the edges.
nightstalkingRune.title: Nightstalking
NIGHTSTALKING_RUNE.title: Nightstalking
nightstalkingRune.flavor: The night is at its best when it hides the next hunter too.
NIGHTSTALKING_RUNE.flavor: The night is at its best when it hides the next hunter too.
masterOfDualityRune.title: Master of Duality
MASTER_OF_DUALITY_RUNE.title: Master of Duality
masterOfDualityRune.description: Playing a Skill grants [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Strength. Playing an Attack grants [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Dexterity.
MASTER_OF_DUALITY_RUNE.description: Playing a Skill grants [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Strength. Playing an Attack grants [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Dexterity.
masterOfDualityRune.flavor: Practice both until the labels stop mattering.
MASTER_OF_DUALITY_RUNE.flavor: Practice both until the labels stop mattering.
bigStrengthRune.title: Blunt Force
BIG_STRENGTH_RUNE.title: Blunt Force
bigStrengthRune.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] Strength.
BIG_STRENGTH_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] Strength.
bigStrengthRune.flavor: No theory. Just more of it.
BIG_STRENGTH_RUNE.flavor: No theory. Just more of it.
handOfBaronRune.title: Hand of Baron
HAND_OF_BARON_RUNE.title: Hand of Baron
handOfBaronRune.description: Gain [blue]20%[/blue] more damage. At the start of each turn, all enemies gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold].
HAND_OF_BARON_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]20%[/blue] more damage. At the start of each turn, all enemies gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold].
handOfBaronRune.flavor: A real blessing always comes with enough weight to kneel to it.
HAND_OF_BARON_RUNE.flavor: A real blessing always comes with enough weight to kneel to it.
cantTouchThisRune.title: Can't Touch This
CANT_TOUCH_THIS_RUNE.title: Can't Touch This
cantTouchThisRune.description: After playing a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] or more, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Buffer[/gold].
CANT_TOUCH_THIS_RUNE.description: After playing a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] or more, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Buffer[/gold].
cantTouchThisRune.flavor: If they want to touch you, they can start by removing a layer.
CANT_TOUCH_THIS_RUNE.flavor: If they want to touch you, they can start by removing a layer.
tormentorRune.title: Tormentor
TORMENTOR_RUNE.title: Tormentor
tormentorRune.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold]. Triggers up to [blue]5[/blue] times each turn.
TORMENTOR_RUNE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold]. Triggers up to [blue]5[/blue] times each turn.
tormentorRune.flavor: Good torment never rushes. It stacks.
TORMENTOR_RUNE.flavor: Good torment never rushes. It stacks.
adamantRune.title: Adamant
ADAMANT_RUNE.title: Adamant
adamantRune.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]3[/blue] Block. Triggers up to [blue]5[/blue] times each turn.
ADAMANT_RUNE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]3[/blue] Block. Triggers up to [blue]5[/blue] times each turn.
adamantRune.flavor: Stand first. Ask what broke later.
ADAMANT_RUNE.flavor: Stand first. Ask what broke later.
getExcitedRune.title: Get Excited
GET_EXCITED_RUNE.title: Get Excited
getExcitedRune.description: Whenever an enemy dies, next turn gain [blue]2[/blue] extra Energy and draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
GET_EXCITED_RUNE.description: Whenever an enemy dies, next turn gain [blue]2[/blue] extra Energy and draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
getExcitedRune.flavor: The best rush is the one that waits half a beat longer.
GET_EXCITED_RUNE.flavor: The best rush is the one that waits half a beat longer.
queenRune.title: Queen
QUEEN_RUNE.title: Queen
queenRune.description: At the start of each turn, all enemies gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Frail[/gold], [gold]Weak[/gold], and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
QUEEN_RUNE.description: At the start of each turn, all enemies gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Frail[/gold], [gold]Weak[/gold], and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
queenRune.flavor: Once the order is spoken, all that remains is obedience.
QUEEN_RUNE.flavor: Once the order is spoken, all that remains is obedience.
mountainSoulRune.title: Mountain Soul
MOUNTAIN_SOUL_RUNE.title: Mountain Soul
mountainSoulRune.description: If you took no unblocked damage last turn, gain Block equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of your Max HP at the start of this turn.
MOUNTAIN_SOUL_RUNE.description: If you took no unblocked damage last turn, gain Block equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of your Max HP at the start of this turn.
mountainSoulRune.flavor: The mountain never speaks. It only remembers who failed to move it.
MOUNTAIN_SOUL_RUNE.flavor: The mountain never speaks. It only remembers who failed to move it.
swiftAndSafeRune.title: Swift and Safe
SWIFT_AND_SAFE_RUNE.title: Swift and Safe
swiftAndSafeRune.description: Every time you draw [blue]10[/blue] cards, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
SWIFT_AND_SAFE_RUNE.description: Every time you draw [blue]10[/blue] cards, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
swiftAndSafeRune.flavor: Speed comes from more draws. Stability comes from the backup plan.
SWIFT_AND_SAFE_RUNE.flavor: Speed comes from more draws. Stability comes from the backup plan.
sacrificeRune.title: Sacrifice
SACRIFICE_RUNE.title: Sacrifice
sacrificeRune.description: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] count for each enemy. After winning combat, gain extra Gold equal to the count.
SACRIFICE_RUNE.description: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] count for each enemy. After winning combat, gain extra Gold equal to the count.
sacrificeRune.flavor: The real offering is whatever numbers are still alive on the board.
SACRIFICE_RUNE.flavor: The real offering is whatever numbers are still alive on the board.
goldrendRune.title: Goldrend
GOLDREND_RUNE.title: Goldrend
goldrendRune.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, gain [blue]1[/blue] count. After winning combat, gain extra Gold equal to the count.
GOLDREND_RUNE.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, gain [blue]1[/blue] count. After winning combat, gain extra Gold equal to the count.
goldrendRune.flavor: Every hit should pay for itself. Otherwise hit again.
GOLDREND_RUNE.flavor: Every hit should pay for itself. Otherwise hit again.
protectiveVeilRune.title: Protective Veil
PROTECTIVE_VEIL_RUNE.title: Protective Veil
protectiveVeilRune.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold]. Every [blue]2[/blue] turns, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
PROTECTIVE_VEIL_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold]. Every [blue]2[/blue] turns, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
protectiveVeilRune.flavor: The layer you can see is usually just courtesy.
PROTECTIVE_VEIL_RUNE.flavor: The layer you can see is usually just courtesy.
repulsorRune.title: Repulsor
REPULSOR_RUNE.title: Repulsor
repulsorRune.description: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, then at the start of your next turn gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold]. Once per combat.
REPULSOR_RUNE.description: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, then at the start of your next turn gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold]. Once per combat.
repulsorRune.flavor: Only when you're cornered does a force field start looking like planning.
REPULSOR_RUNE.flavor: Only when you're cornered does a force field start looking like planning.
thornmailRune.title: Thornmail
THORNMAIL_RUNE.title: Thornmail
thornmailRune.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold]. For every [blue]40[/blue] Max HP, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra [gold]Thorns[/gold], up to [blue]3[/blue] extra.
THORNMAIL_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold]. For every [blue]40[/blue] Max HP, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra [gold]Thorns[/gold], up to [blue]3[/blue] extra.
thornmailRune.flavor: Whoever touches first gets to remember it first.
THORNMAIL_RUNE.flavor: Whoever touches first gets to remember it first.
dawnbringersResolveRune.title: Dawnbringer's Resolve
DAWNBRINGERS_RESOLVE_RUNE.title: Dawnbringer's Resolve
dawnbringersResolveRune.description: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, gain [gold]Regen[/gold] equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of your Max HP. Once per combat.
DAWNBRINGERS_RESOLVE_RUNE.description: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, gain [gold]Regen[/gold] equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of your Max HP. Once per combat.
dawnbringersResolveRune.flavor: Keep the body hanging together first. Dawn can explain itself later.
DAWNBRINGERS_RESOLVE_RUNE.flavor: Keep the body hanging together first. Dawn can explain itself later.
shrinkRayRune.title: Shrink Ray
SHRINK_RAY_RUNE.title: Shrink Ray
shrinkRayRune.description: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, the enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold].
SHRINK_RAY_RUNE.description: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, the enemy gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold].
shrinkRayRune.flavor: Size is negotiable once the beam turns on.
SHRINK_RAY_RUNE.flavor: Size is negotiable once the beam turns on.
zealotRune.title: Zealot
ZEALOT_RUNE.title: Zealot
zealotRune.description: For every [blue]5[/blue] relics you have, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card at the start of combat.
ZEALOT_RUNE.description: For every [blue]5[/blue] relics you have, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card at the start of combat.
zealotRune.flavor: Once the collection gets big enough, even the opening hand starts foaming.
ZEALOT_RUNE.flavor: Once the collection gets big enough, even the opening hand starts foaming.
backToBasicsRune.title: Back To Basics
BACK_TO_BASICS_RUNE.title: Back To Basics
backToBasicsRune.description: You cannot play cards that cost [blue]3[/blue] or more. The healing you receive, the Block you gain, and the damage you deal increase by [blue]30%[/blue].
BACK_TO_BASICS_RUNE.description: You cannot play cards that cost [blue]3[/blue] or more. The healing you receive, the Block you gain, and the damage you deal increase by [blue]30%[/blue].
backToBasicsRune.flavor: When the lesson is harsh enough, every extra flourish looks wasteful.
BACK_TO_BASICS_RUNE.flavor: When the lesson is harsh enough, every extra flourish looks wasteful.
drawYourSwordRune.title: Draw Your Sword
DRAW_YOUR_SWORD_RUNE.title: Draw Your Sword
drawYourSwordRune.description: Gain [blue]30%[/blue] Max HP. At the start of combat, gain [blue]3[/blue] Strength and [blue]3[/blue] Dexterity. Gain [blue]1[/blue] less Energy each turn.
DRAW_YOUR_SWORD_RUNE.description: Gain [blue]30%[/blue] Max HP. At the start of combat, gain [blue]3[/blue] Strength and [blue]3[/blue] Dexterity. Gain [blue]1[/blue] less Energy each turn.
drawYourSwordRune.flavor: If you are going to commit, commit with the whole stance.
DRAW_YOUR_SWORD_RUNE.flavor: If you are going to commit, commit with the whole stance.
feelTheBurnRune.title: Feel The Burn
FEEL_THE_BURN_RUNE.title: Feel The Burn
feelTheBurnRune.description: After you use a Potion, apply [blue]2[/blue] turns of [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], and [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold] to all enemies.
FEEL_THE_BURN_RUNE.description: After you use a Potion, apply [blue]2[/blue] turns of [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], and [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold] to all enemies.
feelTheBurnRune.flavor: Every bottle deserves a wider splash radius.
FEEL_THE_BURN_RUNE.flavor: Every bottle deserves a wider splash radius.
firstAidKitRune.title: First Aid Kit
FIRST_AID_KIT_RUNE.title: First Aid Kit
firstAidKitRune.description: The healing you receive and the Block you gain increase by [blue]20%[/blue].
FIRST_AID_KIT_RUNE.description: The healing you receive and the Block you gain increase by [blue]20%[/blue].
firstAidKitRune.flavor: Field medicine is mostly speed dressed up as care.
FIRST_AID_KIT_RUNE.flavor: Field medicine is mostly speed dressed up as care.
holyFireRune.title: Holy Fire
HOLY_FIRE_RUNE.title: Holy Fire
holyFireRune.description: Whenever you heal during combat, apply [gold]Burn[/gold] to a random enemy equal to the amount healed.
HOLY_FIRE_RUNE.description: Whenever you heal during combat, apply [gold]Burn[/gold] to a random enemy equal to the amount healed.
holyFireRune.flavor: A proper miracle should leave scorch marks on somebody else.
HOLY_FIRE_RUNE.flavor: A proper miracle should leave scorch marks on somebody else.
homeguardRune.title: Homeguard
HOMEGUARD_RUNE.title: Homeguard
homeguardRune.description: If you took no unblocked damage last turn, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards at the start of this turn.
HOMEGUARD_RUNE.description: If you took no unblocked damage last turn, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards at the start of this turn.
homeguardRune.flavor: Safe ground should always pay a dividend.
HOMEGUARD_RUNE.flavor: Safe ground should always pay a dividend.
lightEmUpRune.title: Light Em Up
LIGHT_EM_UP_RUNE.title: Light Em Up
lightEmUpRune.description: Every fourth Attack card you play is played an additional time.
LIGHT_EM_UP_RUNE.description: Every fourth Attack card you play is played an additional time.
lightEmUpRune.flavor: Count long enough and the next spark stops being optional.
LIGHT_EM_UP_RUNE.flavor: Count long enough and the next spark stops being optional.
shrinkEngineRune.title: Shrink Engine
SHRINK_ENGINE_RUNE.title: Shrink Engine
shrinkEngineRune.description: After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Each stack reduces your size by [blue]2%[/blue]. For every [blue]4[/blue] stacks, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card each turn. For every [blue]8[/blue] stacks, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy each turn.
SHRINK_ENGINE_RUNE.description: After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Each stack reduces your size by [blue]2%[/blue]. For every [blue]4[/blue] stacks, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card each turn. For every [blue]8[/blue] stacks, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra Energy each turn.
shrinkEngineRune.flavor: Trim enough bulk away and even the engine starts to whisper.
SHRINK_ENGINE_RUNE.flavor: Trim enough bulk away and even the engine starts to whisper.
transmuteChaosRune.title: Transmute: Chaos
TRANSMUTE_CHAOS_RUNE.title: Transmute: Chaos
transmuteChaosRune.description: When obtained, remove this rune and gain [blue]2[/blue] random Hextech runes.
TRANSMUTE_CHAOS_RUNE.description: When obtained, remove this rune and gain [blue]2[/blue] random Hextech runes.
transmuteChaosRune.flavor: Refinement is just chaos that learned how to keep receipts.
TRANSMUTE_CHAOS_RUNE.flavor: Refinement is just chaos that learned how to keep receipts.
transmutePrismaticRune.title: Transmute: Prismatic
TRANSMUTE_PRISMATIC_RUNE.title: Transmute: Prismatic
transmutePrismaticRune.description: When obtained, remove this rune and gain [blue]1[/blue] random Prismatic Hextech rune.
TRANSMUTE_PRISMATIC_RUNE.description: When obtained, remove this rune and gain [blue]1[/blue] random Prismatic Hextech rune.
transmutePrismaticRune.flavor: If you are going to gamble, at least gamble at the top shelf.
TRANSMUTE_PRISMATIC_RUNE.flavor: If you are going to gamble, at least gamble at the top shelf.
transmuteGoldRune.title: Transmute: Gold
TRANSMUTE_GOLD_RUNE.title: Transmute: Gold
transmuteGoldRune.description: When obtained, remove this rune and gain [blue]1[/blue] random Gold Hextech rune.
TRANSMUTE_GOLD_RUNE.description: When obtained, remove this rune and gain [blue]1[/blue] random Gold Hextech rune.
transmuteGoldRune.flavor: Sometimes the cleanest upgrade is letting the metal choose itself.
TRANSMUTE_GOLD_RUNE.flavor: Sometimes the cleanest upgrade is letting the metal choose itself.
transcendentEvilRune.title: Transcendent Evil
TRANSCENDENT_EVIL_RUNE.title: Transcendent Evil
transcendentEvilRune.description: After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. For every [blue]4[/blue] stacks, gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength and [blue]1[/blue] Focus at the start of combat.
TRANSCENDENT_EVIL_RUNE.description: After winning combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. For every [blue]4[/blue] stacks, gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength and [blue]1[/blue] Focus at the start of combat.
transcendentEvilRune.flavor: Once malice learns to snowball, it stops needing permission.
TRANSCENDENT_EVIL_RUNE.flavor: Once malice learns to snowball, it stops needing permission.
wizardlyThinkingRune.title: Wizardly Thinking
WIZARDLY_THINKING_RUNE.title: Wizardly Thinking
wizardlyThinkingRune.description: At the start of combat, gain Focus equal to the current Act number.
WIZARDLY_THINKING_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain Focus equal to the current Act number.
wizardlyThinkingRune.flavor: Think a little more like a wizard and the core starts listening.
WIZARDLY_THINKING_RUNE.flavor: Think a little more like a wizard and the core starts listening.
ultimateUnstoppableRune.title: Ultimate Unstoppable
ULTIMATE_UNSTOPPABLE_RUNE.title: Ultimate Unstoppable
ultimateUnstoppableRune.description: After you play a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] or more, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
ULTIMATE_UNSTOPPABLE_RUNE.description: After you play a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] or more, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
ultimateUnstoppableRune.flavor: Real momentum does not leave room for counterplay.
ULTIMATE_UNSTOPPABLE_RUNE.flavor: Real momentum does not leave room for counterplay.
finalFormRune.title: Final Form
FINAL_FORM_RUNE.title: Final Form
finalFormRune.description: After you play a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] or more, gain Block equal to [blue]20%[/blue] of your Max HP and draw [blue]3[/blue] cards.
FINAL_FORM_RUNE.description: After you play a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] or more, gain Block equal to [blue]20%[/blue] of your Max HP and draw [blue]3[/blue] cards.
finalFormRune.flavor: The best time to unveil your last form is after the cast has already resolved.
FINAL_FORM_RUNE.flavor: The best time to unveil your last form is after the cast has already resolved.
hailToTheKingRune.title: All Hail The King
HAIL_TO_THE_KING_RUNE.title: All Hail The King
hailToTheKingRune.description: After the first time you defeat an enemy Boss while holding this rune, gain an extra [blue]Rare Relic[/blue] and [blue]1[/blue] random Prismatic Hextech rune.
HAIL_TO_THE_KING_RUNE.description: After the first time you defeat an enemy Boss while holding this rune, gain an extra [blue]Rare Relic[/blue] and [blue]1[/blue] random Prismatic Hextech rune.
hailToTheKingRune.flavor: A coronation only counts after someone else falls below the stairs.
HAIL_TO_THE_KING_RUNE.flavor: A coronation only counts after someone else falls below the stairs.
arcanePunchRune.title: Arcane Punch
ARCANE_PUNCH_RUNE.title: Arcane Punch
arcanePunchRune.description: For every [blue]2[/blue] Attack cards you play, gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy.
ARCANE_PUNCH_RUNE.description: For every [blue]2[/blue] Attack cards you play, gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy.
arcanePunchRune.flavor: If the spell is short enough, it starts sounding like a fist.
ARCANE_PUNCH_RUNE.flavor: If the spell is short enough, it starts sounding like a fist.
pandorasBoxRune.title: Pandora's Box
PANDORAS_BOX_RUNE.title: Pandora's Box
pandorasBoxRune.description: When obtained, transform all of your Hextech runes into random Prismatic Hextech runes.
PANDORAS_BOX_RUNE.description: When obtained, transform all of your Hextech runes into random Prismatic Hextech runes.
pandorasBoxRune.flavor: Once opened, expecting the old contents back is just nostalgia.
PANDORAS_BOX_RUNE.flavor: Once opened, expecting the old contents back is just nostalgia.
tapDanceRune.title: Tap Dance
TAP_DANCE_RUNE.title: Tap Dance
tapDanceRune.description: For each Attack card you play this turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card next turn.
TAP_DANCE_RUNE.description: For each Attack card you play this turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card next turn.
tapDanceRune.flavor: Once the rhythm lands, the next hand follows it on instinct.
TAP_DANCE_RUNE.flavor: Once the rhythm lands, the next hand follows it on instinct.
ultimateRefreshRune.title: Ultimate Refresh
ULTIMATE_REFRESH_RUNE.title: Ultimate Refresh
ultimateRefreshRune.description: The first time each turn you play a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] or more, play it an additional time.
ULTIMATE_REFRESH_RUNE.description: The first time each turn you play a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] or more, play it an additional time.
ultimateRefreshRune.flavor: A true refresh is not a reset. It is another full pass.
ULTIMATE_REFRESH_RUNE.flavor: A true refresh is not a reset. It is another full pass.
slapRune.enemyDescription: Whenever you apply a debuff to a player, gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength. Triggers up to [blue]3[/blue] times each turn.
escapePlanRune.enemyDescription: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, then at the start of the next turn gain Block equal to [blue]60%[/blue] of your Max HP and gain [blue]1[/blue] turn of [gold]Shrink[/gold]. Once per combat.
heavyHitterRune.enemyDescription: Gain [blue]1%[/blue] more damage for every [blue]10[/blue] Max HP you have, up to [blue]30%[/blue].
bigStrengthRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] Strength.
tormentorRune.enemyDescription: Whenever you apply a debuff to a player, they gain [blue]2[/blue] stacks of [gold]Burn[/gold]. Triggers up to [blue]5[/blue] times each turn.
protectiveVeilRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold]. Every [blue]2[/blue] turns, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
protectiveVeilRune.enemyDescriptionMulti: At the start of combat, gain [blue]$N$[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold]. Every [blue]2[/blue] turns, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
repulsorRune.enemyDescription: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, then at the start of the next turn gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold]. Once per combat.
repulsorRune.enemyDescriptionMultiplayer: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, then at the start of the next turn gain [blue]$N$[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold]. Once per combat.
thornmailRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold]. For every [blue]50[/blue] Max HP, gain [blue]1[/blue] extra [gold]Thorns[/gold], up to [blue]3[/blue] extra.
lightEmUpRune.enemyDescription: Every fourth Attack card a player plays costs twice as much.
mountainSoulRune.enemyDescription: If you took no unblocked damage last turn, gain Block equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of your Max HP at the start of this turn.
sturdyRune.enemyDescription: At the start of each turn, heal [blue]2%[/blue] of your Max HP. If you are below [blue]50%[/blue] HP, heal [blue]5%[/blue] of your Max HP instead.
dawnbringersResolveRune.enemyDescription: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, gain [gold]Regen[/gold] equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of your Max HP. Once per combat.
shrinkRayRune.enemyDescription: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, the player gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold].
firebrandRune.enemyDescription: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, apply [blue]2[/blue] stacks of infinitely stackable [gold]Burn[/gold] to the player.
superBrainRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, gain [gold]Plating[/gold] equal to [blue]4%[/blue] of your Max HP.
astralBodyRune.enemyDescription: Gain [blue]30%[/blue] Max HP. Deal [blue]10%[/blue] less damage.
tankEngineRune.enemyDescription: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]5%[/blue] Max HP and increase your size by [blue]5%[/blue].
shrinkEngineRune.enemyDescription: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold] and reduce your size by [blue]2%[/blue].
shrinkEngineRune.enemyDescriptionMultipl: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]$N$[/blue] [gold]Slippery[/gold] and reduce your size by [blue]2%[/blue].
getExcitedRune.enemyDescription: Whenever an ally dies, next turn gain [blue]2[/blue] Temporary Strength and [blue]2[/blue] Temporary Dexterity.
twiceThriceRune.enemyDescription: Every third Attack card a player plays costs twice as much.
loopRune.enemyDescription: Players draw [blue]1[/blue] fewer card each turn.
courageOfColossusRune.enemyDescription: Whenever you apply a debuff to a player or apply a buff to yourself, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold]. Triggers up to [blue]2[/blue] times each turn.
courageOfColossusRune.enemyDescriptionMu: Whenever you apply a debuff to a player or apply a buff to yourself, gain [blue]$PLATING$[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold]. Triggers up to [blue]2[/blue] times each turn.
glassCannonRune.enemyDescription: Deal [blue]40%[/blue] more damage, but you cannot heal above [blue]70%[/blue] HP.
goliathRune.enemyDescription: Grow in size, gain [blue]40%[/blue] Max HP, and gain [blue]20%[/blue] more damage.
queenRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, all players gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Chains of Binding[/gold].
handOfBaronRune.enemyDescription: Gain [blue]20%[/blue] more damage. At the start of combat, all players gain [blue]99[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold]. At the start of each turn, all players gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Shrink[/gold].
cantTouchThisRune.enemyDescription: Whenever you gain Block or a buff, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Buffer[/gold].
cantTouchThisRune.enemyDescriptionMultip: Whenever you gain Block or a buff, gain [blue]$BUFFER$[/blue] [gold]Buffer[/gold].
masterOfDualityRune.enemyDescription: When the player plays a Skill, they lose [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Strength. When the player plays an Attack, they lose [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Dexterity.
goldrendRune.enemyDescription: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, the player loses [blue]10[/blue] Gold.
feelTheBurnRune.enemyDescription: When damage drops you below [blue]50%[/blue] of your Max HP, then at the start of the next turn all players gain [blue]2[/blue] turns of [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], and [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold].
backToBasicsRune.enemyDescription: At the start of combat, downgrade all player cards.
drawYourSwordRune.enemyDescription: Gain [blue]40%[/blue] more damage. At the start of combat, gain [gold]Imbalanced[/gold].
madScientistRune.enemyDescription: Lose [blue]20%[/blue] Max HP. At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Personal Hive[/gold].
